Your Path to Lasting Relief

A Personalized Approach to Healing

At Back to Wellness Chiropractic, we believe that lasting relief comes from personalized care — not one-size-fits-all solutions. Whether you're managing chronic pain, recovering from injury, or simply looking to move better, our treatments are designed to support your body's natural healing process.

In addition to hands-on chiropractic care, we offer advanced therapies like SoftWave and Red Light Therapy to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and accelerate recovery — all without medication, injections, or surgery.

Learn More About Us
What We Offer

Comprehensive Care for Every Need

From hands-on chiropractic adjustments to advanced drug-free therapies, we offer a range of treatments designed to help you heal with confidence.

Chiropractic Care

Gentle, hands-on adjustments tailored to your body and lifestyle. We treat back pain, neck tension, headaches, sciatica, and more — addressing the root cause, not just symptoms.

Learn More →

SoftWave Therapy

Non-invasive treatment using acoustic waves to stimulate your body's natural healing process. Reduces inflammation, relieves pain, and supports faster recovery — no medication or surgery required.

Learn More →

Red Light Therapy

Low-level wavelengths of light that stimulate cellular activity, improve circulation, and support natural healing. Reduces joint and muscle pain, promotes faster recovery, and supports skin health.

Learn More →
What to Expect

Your First Visit, Step by Step

From the moment you arrive, our focus is on understanding your unique needs and creating a treatment plan that supports your goals.

1

One-on-One Consultation

We start by listening. Your first visit includes a thorough consultation where we discuss your symptoms, health history, and personal wellness goals.

2

Detailed Examination

A comprehensive physical exam helps us understand what's going on and identify the root cause of your discomfort — not just the symptoms.

3

X-Rays if Needed

If necessary, we'll take x-rays to get a complete picture of what's happening beneath the surface, ensuring your treatment plan is precisely targeted.

4

Personalized Treatment Plan

We walk you through every step and tailor your plan — whether for chiropractic care, SoftWave, or Red Light Therapy — to help you heal with confidence.

24+
Years of Experience

Initial Treatments

Appointments Available
Advanced Therapy

SoftWave Therapy — Heal Without Surgery

SoftWave Therapy is a non-invasive treatment that uses acoustic waves to stimulate your body's natural healing process. By increasing circulation and encouraging cellular repair, it helps reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support faster recovery.

Especially helpful for conditions like plantar fasciitis, tennis elbow, shoulder pain, knee pain, and other joint or soft tissue injuries. Many patients report noticeable relief within the first few sessions.

💡 New patients can schedule a consultation and initial SoftWave treatment for just $49.

Book Your $49 Treatment
Advanced Therapy

Red Light Therapy — Natural Healing Power

Red Light Therapy uses low-level wavelengths of light to stimulate cellular activity, improve circulation, and support the body's natural healing processes. This non-invasive treatment is known for reducing inflammation, relieving joint and muscle pain, and promoting faster recovery.

In addition to pain relief, Red Light Therapy is often used to support body contouring, reduce the appearance of stubborn fat, and assist with weight management goals when combined with a healthy lifestyle.

💡 New patients can experience Red Light Therapy with a $49 consultation and initial treatment.

Book Your $49 Session

Conditions We Treat

Comprehensive Care for Various Conditions

Back Pain

Targeted adjustments and therapies to address acute and chronic back pain at its source.

Neck Tension

Gentle corrections and soft tissue work to relieve stiffness, tension, and restricted mobility.

Headaches

Chiropractic care that addresses cervicogenic and tension headaches by improving alignment.

Sciatica

Precise adjustments and therapies to relieve sciatic nerve pressure and radiating pain.

Plantar Fasciitis

SoftWave therapy that delivers acoustic waves to reduce plantar inflammation and pain.

Sports Injuries

Recovery support for tendinitis, overuse conditions, and soft tissue injuries from athletics.

Our Kirkwood Office

Take a Look Inside

Get a feel for what to expect before you walk through the door. Our office is designed to be warm, welcoming, and fully equipped for chiropractic care, SoftWave Therapy, and Red Light Therapy.

Frequently Asked Questions

Your Questions, Answered

What is SoftWave Therapy and how does it work?
SoftWave Therapy is a non-invasive treatment that uses acoustic waves to stimulate your body's natural healing process. By increasing circulation and encouraging cellular repair, it helps reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support faster recovery — without medication, injections, or surgery. It's especially helpful for conditions like plantar fasciitis, tennis elbow, shoulder pain, knee pain, and other joint or soft tissue injuries.
What is Red Light Therapy?
Red Light Therapy uses low-level wavelengths of light to stimulate cellular activity, improve circulation, and support the body's natural healing processes. This non-invasive treatment is known for reducing inflammation, relieving joint and muscle pain, and promoting faster recovery. It may also help improve skin tone and support body contouring goals when combined with a healthy lifestyle.
How much does the first visit cost?
New patients can take advantage of our $49 SoftWave or Red Light Therapy consultation and initial treatment specials. If you're paying out of pocket and your insurance doesn't cover care, we offer a comprehensive self-pay first visit package for $150, which includes a consultation, examination, X-rays if needed, and an adjustment.
Do you accept insurance?
We work with many insurance plans for chiropractic care. If your insurance doesn't cover your care, we offer a $150 self-pay first visit package. Contact us at (314) 394-2093 to verify your coverage and discuss payment options.
Are same-day appointments available?
Yes! Same-day appointments are often available. We understand that pain doesn't wait, and we do our best to accommodate urgent needs. Call us at (314) 394-2093 to check availability.
What should I expect on my first visit?
Your first visit includes a one-on-one consultation, a detailed exam, and X-rays if needed to get a complete picture of what's going on. We'll walk you through every step and ensure you feel informed and comfortable from the start. Whether you're here for chiropractic care, SoftWave, or Red Light Therapy, we'll tailor your plan to help you heal with confidence.
Where are you located?
We're located at 11229 Manchester Road in Kirkwood, MO 63122, in the lower level behind Revel Kitchen. Our office is across the street from our former location, with a warm, welcoming space fully equipped for chiropractic care, SoftWave Therapy, and Red Light Therapy.

Ready to Get Back to Wellness?

Book your first visit today and take the next step toward lasting relief — with personalized, non-invasive care that meets you where you are.
